title: U Mass - Hepatic Gluconeogenesis
author: Jason Kim
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xy7fpzn

steps.instruction: Mice are fasted overnight (~15 hours) prior to the start of experiment.
Collect plasma sample (10 µl) before the start of experiment (basal-0 min) to measure basal glucose levels.
Administer intraperitoneal injection of pyruvate (1 g/kg body weight) using an insulin syringe.
Collect plasma samples (10 µl) at 10, 20, 30, 45, 60, 90, and 120 min following pyruvate injection to measure circulating glucose concentrations.
For data analysis, plasma glucose levels vs. time after pyruvate injection are plotted, and area-under-curve may be calculated to estimate hepatic gluconeogenesis.
